description: M4 audit finding F3 (issue #405): `checker-reserved-word.ts` now checks a `struct` type name against Data-primitive names when the `data` profile is active, so `struct dict` raises `ol-reserved-word` (`namespace: "primitive"`) statically — the static counterpart to the existing runtime fixture `data/struct-runtime/struct-reserved-word-primitive`.

diagnostics.message: dict is already a primitive, so it can't be redefined here.
